description: A few days after a service visit, an agent calls the customer to ensure everything is working correctly and they are satisfied with the service.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of customers who had service completed 3-5 days ago.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a daily call list.

nodes.task_description: Call the customer and ask about their experience and if their vehicle is performing as expected.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a courtesy follow-up call.

nodes.task_description: If the customer is satisfied, thank them. If they report an issue, create a ticket for the service manager to address it.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer is satisfied. The agent logs the positive outcome.
